CustomField.description: 1. This is showing current Engine Template ID. 2. If {CurEngTempID} field value is same as associated Projected Event's Maintenance Program Event's Engine Template ID then we are not updating {EngineTemplateID} field on supplement rent record 3. If {CurEngTempID} field value is not same as associated Projected Event's Maintenance Program Event's Engine Template ID then we are updating {EngineTemplateID} field on supplement rent record
CustomField.label: _CurEngTempID
